nodes.title: Fetch Stations For Dashboard
nodes.description: On dashboard page load (/biz/:bizId), call GET /api/businesses/:bizId/stations. Success: stores stations in signal. Failure: stores empty array and shows error in console. Used for station count stat card.

nodes.title: Fetch Employees For Dashboard
nodes.description: On dashboard load, call GET /api/businesses/:bizId/employees. Success: stores employees in signal. Failure: stores empty array. Used for employee count stat card.

nodes.title: Fetch Accounts For Dashboard
nodes.description: On dashboard load, call GET /api/businesses/:bizId/accounts. Success: stores accounts with balances in signal. Failure: stores empty array. Used for account count and balance charts.

nodes.title: Fetch Funds For Dashboard
nodes.description: On dashboard load, call GET /api/businesses/:bizId/funds. Success: stores funds with balances in signal. Failure: stores empty array. Used for fund count and cash flow visualization.

nodes.title: Fetch Additional Entities
nodes.description: On dashboard load, parallel fetch suppliers, pendingAccounts, business details, and warehouses. Calls GET /api/businesses/:bizId/suppliers, /pending-accounts, /:id, /warehouses. Success: stores all in respective signals. Failure: uses fallback empty arrays. All fetches run in Promise.allSettled to handle partial failures gracefully.

nodes.title: Calculate Financial Summary
nodes.description: After fetching accounts and funds, calculate totalReceipts, totalPayments, operationsCount, and netBalance from account and fund data. Updates chart signals (chartData, waterfallData, treemapData) with calculated values. No API call - pure computation on loaded data.

nodes.title: Render Stats Cards
nodes.description: After all data loaded, display stat cards using ThreeStatCardComponent. Shows cards for: stations count, employees count, accounts count, funds count, suppliers count, warehouses count, total salaries. Each card clickable to navigate to respective page. Loading state shows skeleton cards.

nodes.title: Render Financial Charts
nodes.description: After calculating financial summary, render 3D charts using ThreeChartComponent. Displays bar chart (chartData), waterfall chart (waterfallData), treemap (treemapData), and gauge (gaugeValue/gaugeMax). Charts are interactive - clicking triggers handleChartClick to navigate. Empty state shows placeholder message.

nodes.title: Toggle Presentation Mode
nodes.description: When user clicks presentation mode button, toggle presentationMode signal. When true: hides sidebar, maximizes charts to fullscreen, enables auto-rotation animations. When false: restores normal layout. Updates UI classes and chart configurations accordingly.

nodes.title: Handle Chart Click Navigation
nodes.description: When user clicks on a chart section (bar, waterfall segment, treemap node), extract clicked data label. Navigate to corresponding page: 'Stations' → /stations, 'Employees' → /employees, 'Accounts' → /accounts, etc. Shows toast with navigation message.
